title: odontites viscosus
intro: Odontites viscosus, a type of annual plant in the balsam family, is also known as sticky toothwort due to its sticky hairs that resemble the gums around teeth. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, which makes it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Odontites viscosus include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Odontites viscosus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
